subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Open thy tongue in prayer and, with the utmost humility and earnest entreaty, supplicate at the threshold of the Lord of Glory thy weakness and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق زبان بمناجات بگشا و بکمال تضرع و ابتهال بدرگاه حضرت ذوالجلال عجز و
